decisions.summary: Estimate tokens via ceil(activeBytes / 4) rather than parsing per-message Claude API usage blocks from the JSONL.
Define 'activeBytes' as bytes from findLastCompactBoundary() offset to fs.stat().size of the JSONL. Reuses the existing compactOffsetCache.
Display estimated tokens (not raw bytes) in compact 'k'/'M' format so the displayed number and percentage denominator share the same unit (tokens).
When conversation.model is null or unresolved (not in MODEL_CAPABILITIES after resolveModelIdSync()), return contextUsage: null and have the indicator hide entirely. No 200K default.
Compute context usage server-side in conversation-service.ts (new computeContextUsage helper). Invoked from REST conversation routes and from the subscribeConversationMessages RPC stream.
Use CSS container queries (@container) on the header container for responsive variants, not viewport @media. Header width varies with sidebar/panel layouts.
Build a single <ContextUsageIndicator> component reused by both ConversationTerminal.tsx and ConversationPanel.tsx headers. Component owns format helper, color thresholds, and responsive CSS.
Color thresholds per the issue: green <50%, yellow 50-80%, red >80%. Use existing semantic CSS variables (--primary, --warning, --danger or equivalents).
Live updates piggyback on the existing subscribeConversationMessages RPC stream. ContextUsage is included in each ConversationEvent payload. No new file watcher, no new polling loop.
Extend Conversation contract (packages/contracts) with optional contextUsage field. REST GET /api/conversations and GET /api/conversations/:id enrich responses with it.

hazards.summary: bytes/4 is only a rough heuristic. Long-token languages and code-heavy content drift; the indicator could under-report or over-report by ~20%.
hazards.mitigation: Document the heuristic in a code comment near computeContextUsage. Acceptable for v1 — the indicator is a pressure gauge, not an accounting tool. Future enhancement: parse Claude usage blocks when available.

hazards.summary: Non-Claude harnesses (Pi/OpenAI/Gemini) may set conversation.model to provider-specific IDs that aren't keys in MODEL_CAPABILITIES.
hazards.mitigation: resolveModelIdSync() maps deprecated IDs; for genuinely unknown IDs, fall through to contextUsage: null. Indicator hides gracefully. Test with both 'claude-opus-4-7' and a fabricated unknown model ID.

hazards.summary: Compaction boundary is byte-offset-based. If the JSONL is truncated or rewritten, the cached offset may point past the new EOF.
hazards.mitigation: findLastCompactBoundary already handles cache invalidation when the file shrinks (cache check on scannedUpTo > currentSize). Verify in the helper: clamp activeBytes to max(0, fileSize - boundaryOffset).

hazards.summary: Recomputing context usage on every REST list call could repeatedly fs.stat() many JSONL files for users with hundreds of conversations.
hazards.mitigation: fs.stat is cheap; findLastCompactBoundary is already cached. Acceptable for v1. If profiling shows it's slow, add a 1-second TTL cache on (fileSize, model) → ContextUsage.

hazards.summary: Two header components (ConversationTerminal and ConversationPanel) live in different module trees (CommandDeck vs chat). Sharing a component across them needs a location that both can import from.
hazards.mitigation: Place <ContextUsageIndicator> under src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/ (existing shared chat primitives) or a new src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/shared/ directory. Decide during component bead based on existing import patterns.

hazards.summary: Existing dashboard CSS uses viewport @media queries, not container queries. Introducing @container may surprise reviewers.
hazards.mitigation: Component bead's acceptance criteria explicitly call out container query usage. Provide a fallback for browsers without @container support (degrade to wide-display variant, which is acceptable since the indicator remains functional).

hazards.summary: The indicator must update live without breaking the existing message stream payload shape.
hazards.mitigation: Extend ConversationEvent union additively (new optional field) rather than mutating existing event shapes. Frontend treats contextUsage as 'latest known value' — no state machine needed.

sessionHistory.note: Auto-plan: surveyed conversation-service, MODEL_CAPABILITIES, Conversation type, RPC stream, and both header components. Decided on bytes/4 token estimation, server-side compute in conversation-service.ts, single reusable indicator component, container queries for responsive, RPC-stream-based live updates. Authored vBRIEF with 7 beads (2 foundation, 5 mechanical).
